executive_summary: The facility consumed 88079.98 kWh over 30 days, with top opportunities for savings discovered in unscheduled running and tariff optimization. The robotic welder and injection molder machines presented the most significant opportunities for reduction, with potential savings of ₹122.94 and ₹1905.74 respectively. A comparison of shift-to-shift waste revealed that Shift A had 15% less waste than Shift C. Implementing these recommendations can lead to substantial financial and carbon savings, with an estimated reduction of 366.85 kg CO2e. By optimizing production schedules and reducing unscheduled running, the facility can minimize energy waste and lower costs. The recommended changes can be implemented with varying levels of difficulty, requiring collaboration between operators, production planners, and facility managers. Overall, addressing these opportunities will contribute to a more efficient and sustainable facility operation.

recommendations.issue: Excess power draw of +1.66 kW during unscheduled production
recommendations.action: Schedule production to minimize unscheduled running
recommendations.operator_action_step_by_step: 1. Review production schedule, 2. Identify unscheduled running, 3. Adjust schedule to minimize unscheduled running
recommendations.management_impact_narrative: Implementing this recommendation will result in estimated weekly savings of ₹117.13 and a reduction of 14.78 kg CO2e
